text: I feel like an observer within a silent, possibly abandoned or after-hours office or institutional space. The deep shadows and sparse illumination give everything around me an uncertain, almost suspenseful quality. My consciousness is heightened by the isolation and stillness; I contemplate the absence of human presence and what stories these empty spaces might whisper. The cold clarity of the glass and steel contrasts with the vague shapes and dim light, bringing a sense of both curiosity and wary solitude.
